name: inveteratus/monolegacy
description: Forked from davemacaulay/mccodesv2, reset to v2.0.5b and reworked

scripts.mysql: docker compose exec -it db mysql -umonolegacy -psecret monolegacy
scripts.import: docker compose exec -T db mysql -umonolegacy -psecret monolegacy < schema.sql
scripts.dump: docker compose exec -T db mysqldump --no-tablespaces -umonolegacy -psecret monolegacy > schema.sql
